name: Copperwhisk
personality: This wide-eyed cat in a wizard hat outlasts any infinite loop or incompetent teammate through multi-hour build pipelines and passive-aggressive PR threads. It treats every bug as a feature and moves on, so don't expect a log trail — just silent, tenacious endurance.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
